# AFO Mobile Visual Runtime

Version: 0.0.3.1

Dogfoodma v0.03.1 is the cockpit restoration patch. It restores the real interactive Three.js frontend while keeping the premium MCP-style routes and compiler contracts.

Live runtime:
https://afo-mobile-visual-runtime.jaredtechfit.workers.dev

Important browser checks:
- 3D scene renders
- drag/fly works
- Brake works
- Boost works
- Reset works
- speed label updates
- crosshair focuses nodes
- tapping a node opens metadata drawer
- top nav opens Studio, Tools, Schema, Sample, and Receipt panels

Agent routes:
- /mcp/tools
- /mcp/schema
- /mcp/call
- /api/design/presets
- /api/design/compile
- /api/scene/export/three-json
- /api/scene/export/r3f
- /api/scene/export/gltf-manifest
- /api/compile
- /api/receipt
